title: Productize self-hosted overlay; decouple panels from surface window

description: Extract spike stack into honse-overlay (renderer, input, con
notes: Extracted spike into honse-services::overlay (module, not new crate — registry must interop with hotkeys/frame/init living there; edge-sdk stays below). stack.rs: own egui ctx + egui-directx11 =0.12.1, per-Present RTV, 300-fail tolerance, chained WndProc + register_wndproc_chord (one binding one owner), per-DLL statics; d3d11_state.rs: full pipeline backup/restore (FINDINGS #6). Rendered from frame.rs present trampoline after frame jobs, before edge GUI. Build/clippy/tests green.

description: Own-context panel/window registry: chromeless areas, real-cl
notes: overlay/mod.rs registry: chromeless draggable egui::Area panels; decorated egui::Window with .open() — user [X] sets visible=false and stays closed; register_window auto-registers 'Show <title>' hachimi-menu item; visibility default hidden (silent boot); debounced (2s) position persistence to per-plugin layout file via InitOptions::overlay_layout_file (+ flush_layout for shutdown). Unit tests: visibility, register/unregister, layout round-trip, corrupt-file fresh start.

description: Migrate honse-tracker panels + config UI onto honse-overlay;
notes: Tracker's 6 panels now own-context chromeless Areas (register_panel); Tracker config UI a decorated own-context window ("tracker_config"/"Honse Tracker") with real close + hachimi-menu reopen. compat shim: dropped ui_from_ptr/register_tab/register_page*/register_panel*/overlay_flags; visibility routes to honse_services::overlay. ui/overlay.rs → ui/overlay_panels.rs. Zero surface usage left in tracker. Build/clippy/tests green (138 tests). Commit 33d42ac.

description: Migrate race-hud overlays; retire surface.rs machinery when
notes: Race-hud: timer + 3 uma widgets → own-context Areas; control page → own-context "Race HUD" window with per-widget visibility checkboxes (ea3603f). Debug: viewer → own-context window; spike own_overlay.rs deleted, replaced by "Overlay Demo" window on the shared stack with WndProc-owned Alt+9 (4c1d34b). surface.rs deleted entirely — watchdog, reshow, parasitic draw, host-window registries; InitOptions::surface_title removed (bd90269). Workspace clippy clean, 192 tests pass.

description: Drop/relax egui-rustc lockstep for UI once ui_from_ptr is go
notes: Verified zero ui_from_ptr/show_window/register_menu_section callers outside edge-sdk. README compatibility + EGUI LOCKSTEP RULE rewritten (lockstep only if host-egui entry points are used); rust-toolchain.toml rationale updated (pin kept for reproducible builds + host-egui escape hatch); check-rustc-lockstep.ps1 header notes it's informational now; release.yml compat blurb updated; edge-sdk gui.rs carries a HOST-EGUI = ABI LOCKSTEP warning. Commit e9798a5.

description: In-game gate: independent panels, real close, race HUD, edge
